title: December 6
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 6''' is the 340th day (341st on leap years) of the year. There are 25 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1929|1929]] – [[Frank Springer]] is born.
*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Richard Edlund]] is born.
*[[1940s#1942|1942]] – [[Richard Miller]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 44|''Star Wars Weekly'' 44]] published.
*[[1986]] – "[[Battle for the Sunstar]]" airs on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*[[2000]] – [[Darth Maul (2000) 4|''Darth Maul'' (2000) 4]] published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' released on [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]].
*[[2005]] – ''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'', ''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'', and [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] released in [[eBook]] format.
*2005 – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume Two|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume Two]] released.
*[[2006]] – [[Rebellion 5|''Rebellion'' 5]] published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Enter the Unknown]]'' released.
*[[2016]] – [[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story|Rogue One]]: [[Scarif]] DLC released for ''[[Star Wars Battlefront]]''.
*[[2017]] – [[Darth Vader (2017) 9|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 9]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Dark Side]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Chapter 5: The Gunslinger]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2019 – [[The Mandalorian: Chapter 5 (Original Score)|''The Mandalorian'': Chapter 5 (Original Score)]] released digitally.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Rebels (webcomic)|''Star Wars Rebels'']] manga adaptation began serialization in Japan.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars Insider: The High Republic: Starlight Stories]]'' published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars Insider 215|''Star Wars Insider'' 215]] published.
*[[2023]] – [[Dark Droids: D-Squad 4|''Dark Droids: D-Squad'' 4]] published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars (2020) 41|''Star Wars'' (2020) 41]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 1|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 1]] published.
*[[2024]] – "[[The Missing Life Day Feast / The Lost Treasure of Tenoo]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
<noinclude>
